introSection: Batman The Ride is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Six Flags Magic Mountain in Valencia, California, USA. The ride, along with many other copies, was designed and built by Bolliger & Mabillard. It opened on March 26, 1994.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The addition of Batman The Ride was announced on August 4, 1993.

Batman The Ride opened on March 26, 1994.

During the 2014 season, Batman The Ride ran backwards, along with Colossus.

The ride would be repainted in 2021. As part of the DC Universe remodel in 2022, the queue and exit paths were rerouted and the ride received a new entrance and new lights in the station.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride features a height of, a top speed of , a 59° angle of descent, five inversions, and a maximum g-force of 4.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: The original color scheme was silver track and gray supports. The attraction was repainted with blue track and black supports in 2010.

fullText:
Batman The Ride is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Six Flags Magic Mountain in Valencia, California, USA. The ride, along with many other copies, was designed and built by Bolliger & Mabillard. It opened on March 26, 1994.

The addition of Batman The Ride was announced on August 4, 1993.

Batman The Ride opened on March 26, 1994.

During the 2014 season, Batman The Ride ran backwards, along with Colossus.

The ride would be repainted in 2021. As part of the DC Universe remodel in 2022, the queue and exit paths were rerouted and the ride received a new entrance and new lights in the station.

The ride features a height of, a top speed of , a 59° angle of descent, five inversions, and a maximum g-force of 4.

The original color scheme was silver track and gray supports. The attraction was repainted with blue track and black supports in 2010.
